label: Real-Time Scribing
subtitle: No typing, no transcription delays — just instant documentation.
description: AIMS captures every detail of your conversation in real time and builds structured SOAP notes as you speak. You don’t need to dictate separately or wait for transcription — your documentation is ready the moment the visit ends.~nPhysicians using AIMS report 70% less documentation time and a noticeable improvement in patient connection and care quality.

label: Automatic ICD-10 & CPT Extraction
subtitle: Accurate billing codes, automatically extracted from your notes.
description: Incorrect or missing codes are among the top reasons for insurance claim denials. AIMS eliminates that risk by automatically identifying and tagging ICD-10 and CPT codes within each note.~nIt’s designed to comply with payer and PIP documentation standards, ensuring your claims are processed faster — and your revenue cycle runs smoother.

label: HIPAA-Compliant EHR Integration
subtitle: Seamless sync with EHRs. Built for privacy-first clinics.
description: AIMS integrates directly with leading EHR systems, allowing your notes and codes to sync automatically. Every transaction and transfer is encrypted, meeting HIPAA and HITECH standards.~nYour patient data remains private, secure, and never resold — unlike many other AI note-taking platforms.
